requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (NBSM NS certification + NS/IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（NBSM NS认证 + NS/IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（NBSM NS認證 + NS/IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Nepal market fall under the standards regime administered by the Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM), which operates NS (Nepal Standard) certification and conformity for regulated products. Nepal generally adopts IEC text as its NS standards, so the applicable safety basis for refrigerators is IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers) read with IEC 60335-1. Where the product is within NBSM mandatory certification scope, an NS conformity mark/certificate is required, typically obtained by, or in the name of, an in-country Nepali importer. Products must be rated for Nepal's grid of 230 V, 50 Hz; the 50 Hz frequency is the same as China but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V, so rating plates, plug type and instructions must match local supply. Exporters should confirm with NBSM and the importer whether the specific model is regulated and which NS standard edition applies. Status: INFORMATIONAL — scope and certification route should be verified.
summary.zh: 投放尼泊尔市场的家用制冷器具受尼泊尔标准与计量局（NBSM）管理的标准制度约束，NBSM对受管制产品实施NS（尼泊尔标准）认证与合格评定。尼泊尔通常将IEC文本采纳为其NS标准，故电冰箱适用的安全基准为IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），须与IEC 60335-1结合使用。若产品属NBSM强制认证范围，则须取得NS合格评定标志/证书，通常由在地尼泊尔进口商取得或以其名义取得。产品须按尼泊尔230 V、50 Hz电网额定；50 Hz频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国的220/380 V，故铭牌、插头类型及说明书须匹配当地供电。出口商应向NBSM及进口商确认具体型号是否受管制及适用哪一版NS标准。状态：信息性——范围与认证路径须核实。
summary.zht: 投放尼泊爾市場的家用製冷器具受尼泊爾標準與計量局（NBSM）管理的標準制度約束，NBSM對受管制產品實施NS（尼泊爾標準）認證與合格評定。尼泊爾通常將IEC文本採納為其NS標準，故電冰箱適用的安全基準為IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），須與IEC 60335-1結合使用。若產品屬NBSM強制認證範圍，則須取得NS合格評定標誌/證書，通常由在地尼泊爾進口商取得或以其名義取得。產品須按尼泊爾230 V、50 Hz電網額定；50 Hz頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國的220/380 V，故銘牌、插頭類型及說明書須匹配當地供電。出口商應向NBSM及進口商確認具體型號是否受管制及適用哪一版NS標準。狀態：資訊性——範圍與認證路徑須核實。

standards_or_laws: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM) — NS certification / conformity scheme for regulated products (Nepal Standards Act / Standards and Metrology framework)

NS / IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (IEC text adopted as Nepal Standard)
NS / IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
Nepal grid: 230 V, 50 Hz (rating, marking and plug type must match)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with Chinese national deviations, read with GB 4706.1-2005 (general requirements). It is enforced under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime by SAMR/CNCA, and CCC certification by a designated body is required before sale in China. Because both the China GB and Nepal NS lines descend from the same IEC 60335-2-24 text, the underlying technical requirements are close. However, a Chinese CCC certificate or GB 4706.13 test report is NOT automatically accepted by NBSM as NS conformity evidence; acceptance, re-testing, or in-country verification is determined by NBSM and the importer. China's nominal voltage (220/380 V) also differs from Nepal's 230 V even though both run at 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并含中国国家偏差，须与GB 4706.1-2005（通用要求）结合使用。该标准由市场监管总局（SAMR）/CNCA通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行，产品须经指定机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。由于中国GB与尼泊尔NS均源自同一IEC 60335-2-24文本，底层技术要求相近。但中国CCC证书或GB 4706.13检测报告不被NBSM自动接受为NS合格评定证据；是否接受、重新检测或在地核验由NBSM及进口商决定。中国标称电压（220/380 V）亦不同于尼泊尔230 V，尽管两者频率均为50 Hz。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並含中國國家偏差，須與GB 4706.1-2005（通用要求）結合使用。該標準由市場監管總局（SAMR）/CNCA通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行，產品須經指定機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。由於中國GB與尼泊爾NS均源自同一IEC 60335-2-24文本，底層技術要求相近。但中國CCC證書或GB 4706.13檢測報告不被NBSM自動接受為NS合格評定證據；是否接受、重新檢測或在地核驗由NBSM及進口商決定。中國標稱電壓（220/380 V）亦不同於尼泊爾230 V，儘管兩者頻率均為50 Hz。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — administered by SAMR/CNCA

gap.en: The core gap is recognition, not core technical content: because Nepal NS adopts IEC 60335-2-24 and China GB 4706.13 also derives from it, the engineering test programme overlaps substantially, but a Chinese CCC certificate does not by itself constitute NBSM NS conformity. Exporters should (a) confirm with NBSM and the in-country importer whether the model is within NBSM mandatory certification scope; (b) determine whether existing IEC/CB-Scheme test reports (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) can be leveraged for NS conformity, since IEC-aligned reports are generally the most portable route; (c) ensure the rating plate, plug and instructions reflect 230 V, 50 Hz Nepal supply rather than China 220/380 V; and (d) route NS application and customs through a Nepali importer, as Nepal is landlocked and goods transit Indian ports (Kolkata/Vizag). This is informational; NBSM scope lists and current NS editions must be verified.
gap.zh: 核心差距在于认可而非核心技术内容：由于尼泊尔NS采纳IEC 60335-2-24、中国GB 4706.13亦源自该标准，工程检测项目大量重叠，但中国CCC证书本身并不构成NBSM NS合格评定。出口商应（a）向NBSM及在地进口商确认型号是否属NBSM强制认证范围；（b）判断现有IEC/CB体系检测报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）能否用于NS合格评定，因IEC对齐报告通常为最具可移植性的路径；（c）确保铭牌、插头及说明书反映尼泊尔230 V、50 Hz供电而非中国220/380 V；（d）经尼泊尔进口商办理NS申请与清关，因尼泊尔为内陆国、货物经印度港口（加尔各答/维沙卡帕特南）转运。本条为信息性；NBSM范围清单及现行NS版本须核实。
gap.zht: 核心差距在於認可而非核心技術內容：由於尼泊爾NS採納IEC 60335-2-24、中國GB 4706.13亦源自該標準，工程檢測項目大量重疊，但中國CCC證書本身並不構成NBSM NS合格評定。出口商應（a）向NBSM及在地進口商確認型號是否屬NBSM強制認證範圍；（b）判斷現有IEC/CB體系檢測報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）能否用於NS合格評定，因IEC對齊報告通常為最具可移植性的路徑；（c）確保銘牌、插頭及說明書反映尼泊爾230 V、50 Hz供電而非中國220/380 V；（d）經尼泊爾進口商辦理NS申請與清關，因尼泊爾為內陸國、貨物經印度港口（加爾各答/維沙卡帕特南）轉運。本條為資訊性；NBSM範圍清單及現行NS版本須核實。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional/Mandatory — NBSM NS certification/conformity required where the refrigerator falls within NBSM regulated/mandatory scope; safety basis is NS/IEC 60335-2-24. Scope must be confirmed with NBSM and the importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Nepal, electrical safety of household refrigerators is governed by NBSM NS certification with NS/IEC 60335-2-24 as the technical basis. China GB 4706.13 shares the same IEC ancestry, so test content overlaps, but a Chinese CCC certificate is not automatically accepted as NS conformity — confirm NBSM scope and route NS application plus customs through a Nepali importer. Ensure ratings match Nepal's 230 V, 50 Hz supply (same frequency as China, different nominal voltage). Verify current NBSM scope and NS editions with NBSM and a qualified consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在尼泊尔，家用电冰箱的电气安全由NBSM NS认证管辖，技术基准为NS/IEC 60335-2-24。中国GB 4706.13具相同IEC渊源，故检测内容重叠，但中国CCC证书不被自动接受为NS合格评定——须确认NBSM范围，并经尼泊尔进口商办理NS申请及清关。须确保额定值匹配尼泊尔230 V、50 Hz供电（频率与中国相同，标称电压不同）。请向NBSM及合格顾问核实现行NBSM范围与NS版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在尼泊爾，家用電冰箱的電氣安全由NBSM NS認證管轄，技術基準為NS/IEC 60335-2-24。中國GB 4706.13具相同IEC淵源，故檢測內容重疊，但中國CCC證書不被自動接受為NS合格評定——須確認NBSM範圍，並經尼泊爾進口商辦理NS申請及清關。須確保額定值匹配尼泊爾230 V、50 Hz供電（頻率與中國相同，標稱電壓不同）。請向NBSM及合格顧問核實現行NBSM範圍與NS版本。
